title: poa serotina var. fertilis
intro: Poa serotina var. fertilis, also known as green needlegrass, is a perennial grass native to the Pacific Northwest region of North America. This plant has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Poa serotina var. fertilis include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory function, as well as supporting immune system function and digestion. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional medicine practices.
